title: Heitman Achieves Record Capital Commitments for Global Real Estate Fund
content: Heitman Capital Management announced exceptional investor demand for its latest global real estate fund, exceeding target commitments. The fund attracted capital from leading institutional investors worldwide, reflecting confidence in the firm's investment expertise and track record of delivering superior risk-adjusted returns in real estate markets.

title: Heitman Expands Private Equity Team with Strategic Hires
content: The firm strengthened its private equity platform by adding experienced investment professionals to key markets. These additions enhance Heitman's ability to identify and execute transformative transactions across core industrial and business services sectors. The expansion underscores the firm's commitment to value creation through operational excellence.

title: Heitman Opens New EMEA Investment Office in London
content: Heitman Capital Management established a new regional investment office in London to strengthen its presence in Europe, Middle East, and Africa. The office will focus on identifying real estate and private equity opportunities while deepening relationships with institutional investors across the EMEA region. This strategic expansion supports Heitman's global diversification strategy.
